compiled_state.title: validate.sh: [DSO WARN] message misleadingly says lint skipped when ruff/mypy fallback active -> confusing operator output
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Incident Overview
Source: code review (passed) — minor finding not addressed in this session.
Finding: The [DSO WARN] message says 'lint step will be skipped' when commands.lint is absent, but the individual CMD_LINT_RUFF/CMD_LINT_MYPY checks still run via the fallback path. The message is inaccurate for repos using the legacy individual lint keys.
File: plugins/dso/scripts/validate.sh
Category: maintainability

## Expected Behavior
Warning message accurately describes the state — e.g. 'commands.lint not configured — using lint_ruff/lint_mypy fallback' when fallback is active, or 'lint step will be skipped' only when no lint is configured at all.

## Actual Behavior
Warning always says 'lint step will be skipped' even when ruff/mypy fallback is active.
